mapper.select: SELECT a.id, ma.id AS menu_api_id, a.module, a.app_code, a.api_code, a.api_method, a.api_uri, a.api_name, a.write_flag, a.create_time, a.create_by, a.update_time, a.update_by FROM iam_menu_api ma INNER JOIN iam_api a ON a.api_code = ma.api_code AND a.deleted = 0 WHERE ma.deleted = 0 AND ma.menu_code = #{menuCode} ORDER BY a.api_uri ASC

WITH RECURSIVE menu_path AS ( SELECT m.id, m.parent_code, m.menu_code, m.menu_name, m.sort, m.menu_code AS root_menu_code FROM iam_menu m INNER JOIN iam_menu_api ma ON ma.menu_code = m.menu_code AND ma.deleted = 0 WHERE m.deleted = 0 AND ma.api_code = #{apiCode} UNION ALL SELECT p.id, p.parent_code, p.menu_code, p.menu_name, p.sort, mp.root_menu_code FROM iam_menu p INNER JOIN menu_path mp ON p.menu_code = mp.parent_code AND p.deleted = 0 ) SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(mp.menu_name ORDER BY mp.sort ASC, mp.id ASC SEPARATOR ' > ') AS menu_full_path FROM menu_path mp GROUP BY mp.root_menu_code ORDER BY menu_full_path
